{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Syndicate
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Syndicate]] includes members wearing black suits.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Nafir Nuren]] wanted to hire [[Omega]] against the [[Syndicate]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43">''The Engineer'', chapter 43</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|"I wanted to hire you against the Syndicate."<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
